topic: Three knocks come from inside my headboard every night.
title: Three Knocks Inside My Headboard | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Three knocks came from inside my headboard every night.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a solid wooden headboard behind a pillow, dim bedroom, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is a heavy old bed I inherited from family.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an antique wooden bed frame in a sparse room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The headboard is solid wood, no hollow inside.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a close view of dense wood grain on a headboard, dim lamp glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first knocks were soft, like a polite request.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a pillow against a dark headboard, faint light from a bedside lamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sat up, my heart loud in my chest.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of rumpled sheets thrown back in a dark room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Always three. Always at the same late hour.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a dim bedside clock face near a headboard, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I pulled the bed apart looking for the cause.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a dismantled bed frame leaning against a wall, tools on the floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The wood was whole, with no gap, no space inside.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a solid headboard panel held up to dim light, unbroken grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I knocked back three times, just to answer.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a knuckles resting against a wooden headboard, low lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It answered with three knocks, then a fourth.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a headboard in near total darkness, a single thin crack down the wood, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I gave the bed away and bought a plain new one.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a simple new bed frame in an empty room, grey daylight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The new headboard knocked three times that very first night.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a plain modern headboard in a dark room, faint moonlight on the wood, vertical 9:16 framing
